welcome.subject: Welcome to Crypto Pay
welcome.preheader: Welcome to Crypto Pay — add your payout wallet.
welcome.heroSubtitle: Complete setup by adding your first payout wallet.
welcome.thanks: Thank you for creating a Crypto Pay merchant account{businessSuffix}.
welcome.multiWallet: Your account supports multiple payout wallets across BTC, ETH, USDT, USDC, and LTC. Each address is reviewed before use.
welcome.step2: Our team verifies the wallet (1–2 business days)
welcome.support: Questions? Reply to this email or write to {supportEmail}

wallet_submitted.subject: We received your payout wallet
wallet_submitted.preheader: Your payout wallet is pending verification on Crypto Pay.
wallet_submitted.body: Thank you. We have received your payout wallet and queued it for review. Most addresses are verified within one to two business days.
wallet_submitted.multiWalletNote: You may register multiple payout wallets (separate networks or labels). Each address is reviewed independently.
wallet_submitted.securityNote: We only ever ask for public addresses — never private keys or seed phrases.
wallet_submitted.support: Need help? Reply to this email or contact {supportEmail}

verified.subject: Wallet verified: {walletLabel}
verified.body: Your payout wallet {walletLabel} has been verified. It will be used for crypto settlements when checkout is enabled on your account.

rejected.subject: Wallet not approved: {walletLabel}
rejected.body:
We were unable to approve {walletLabel} at this time.{reasonBlock}

Please update the wallet address in your dashboard and submit again.

wallet_status.support: Need help? Reply to this email or contact {supportEmail}
